headline: Dow Jones Special Committee Elects Melanie Kirkpatrick
summary: NEW YORK, March 18, 2026--The Dow Jones Special Committee, established as part of the acquisition of Dow Jones & Co. by News Corp in late 2007, has elected Melanie Kirkpatrick to succeed Tom Bray.

raw.headline: Dow Jones Special Committee Elects Melanie Kirkpatrick
raw.summary: NEW YORK, March 18, 2026--The Dow Jones Special Committee, established as part of the acquisition of Dow Jones & Co. by News Corp in late 2007, has elected Melanie Kirkpatrick to succeed Tom Bray.

headline: April 12-18th is the Best Week to Sell in 2026 According to Realtor.com®
summary: Typical market seasonality and improving affordability conditions are converging to create a highly favorable window for U.S. home sellers during the week of April 12-18th. According to the 2026 Best Time to Sell report from Realtor.com®, the week of April 12-18th is expected to be the best time to list a home in 2026, offering a "Goldilocks" balance of higher prices, strong buyer demand, and a fast market pace.
